title: RC4609 Election or Revocation of Election to Use a Real-Time Calculation Method or the Reconciliation Method for GST/HST Purposes - Canada.ca
content:
## RC4609 Election or Revocation of Election to Use a Real-Time Calculation Method or the Reconciliation Method for GST/HST Purposes
You must download the accessible fillable PDF to your computer. Use Acrobat Reader 10 or later to open the file. Do not click the link to open it in your web browser.
- Download and save the PDF to your computer
- Open the downloaded PDF in Acrobat Reader 10 or later
Fill out this form if an investment plan that is a selected listed financial institution (SLFI) only for GST/HST purposes wants to make or revoke an election under section 49 of the Selected Listed Financial Institutions Attribution Method (GST/HST) Regulations (SLFI Regulations) to use a real-time calculation method, or an election under section 50 of the SLFI Regulations to use the reconciliation method, to determine their provincial attribution percentages for a fiscal year.

## Ways to get the form
- Download and fill out with Acrobat Reader You must download and open fillable PDFs in Acrobat Reader 10 or higher. Accessible Fillable PDF (rc4609-fill-23e.pdf)

### Download and fill out with Acrobat Reader
You must download and open fillable PDFs in Acrobat Reader 10 or higher.
- Accessible Fillable PDF (rc4609-fill-23e.pdf)
- Print and fill out by hand Standard print PDF (rc4609-23e.pdf)

### Print and fill out by hand
- Standard print PDF (rc4609-23e.pdf)
- Ask for an alternate format You can order alternate formats such as digital audio, electronic text, braille, and large print. Order alternate formats for persons with disabilities

### Ask for an alternate format
You can order alternate formats such as digital audio, electronic text, braille, and large print.
- Order alternate formats for persons with disabilities

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
